title: Optical component, lighting device and vehicle
abstract: The present invention relates to an optical component, comprising: a light source (101) configured to emit light; a light guide unit (102), configured to receive and guide light emitted by the light source (101) and output the light through a light exit face of the light guide unit; and a backplate (103) configured to provide support for the light guide unit (102), wherein the optical component (100) further comprises a transparent front plate (105), the transparent front plate (105) being arranged in front of the main light exit face of the light guide unit (102) and configured to transmit light from the main light exit face. The present invention also provides a lighting device and a vehicle.
claims: Claims ( 11 ) Optical component (100), characterized by comprising: a light source (101) configured to emit light; a light guide unit (102), configured to receive and guide light emitted by the light source (101) and output the light through a main light exit face of the light guide unit (102); and a backplate (103) configured to provide support for the light guide unit (102); the optical component (100) further comprising a transparent front plate (105), the transparent front plate (105) being arranged in front of the main light exit face of the light guide unit (102) and configured to transmit light from the main light exit face. Optical component (100) according to Claim 1, characterized in that the light guide unit (102) comprises at least a first portion (1021) and a second portion (1022), the at least first portion (1021) and second portion (1022) being arranged at a certain angle to each other. Optical component (100) according to Claim 2, characterized in that an angle between adjacent portions in the light guide unit (102) is obtuse. Optical component (100) according to Claim 3, characterized in that a rib (104) is provided between the at least first portion (1021) and second portion (1022) to separate the at least first portion (1021) and second portion (1022). Optical component (100) according to Claim 4, characterized in that the rib (104) is integrally formed with the backplate (103). Optical component (100) according to any of Claims 1 - 5, characterized in that the transparent front plate (105) extends towards the backplate (103), and encloses a side wall of the light guide unit (102). Optical component (100) according to Claim 6, characterized in that the transparent front plate (105) covers at least the first portion (1021) and second portion (1022) of the light guide unit (102), and encloses a first side wall (1024) thereof extending in a direction of light propagation as well as a second side wall (1025) at an end opposite the light source. Optical component (100) according to Claim 7, characterized in that a coating is provided on the first side wall (1024) and second side wall (1025). Optical component (100) according to Claim 7 or 8, characterized in that a colour of the transparent front plate (105) is colourless, red or pale red. Lighting device, characterized by comprising the optical component (100) according to any one of Claims 1 - 9. Vehicle, characterized by comprising the optical component according to any one of Claims 1 - 9 or the lighting device according to Claim 10.
